requirement_topic.en: Market Access and Controlled Goods Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入与受控产品范围
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入與受控產品範圍

summary.en: Singapore market access for a power tool turns on whether the item is a Controlled Good under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme administered by Enterprise Singapore. Household-type tools that fall within the controlled-goods list must be registered for a SAFETY Mark, and registration must be held by a Singapore-based Registered Supplier who is the responsible economic operator. Industrial tools generally fall outside the controlled-goods list and do not need a SAFETY Mark, but remain subject to general consumer-protection and product-safety duties.
summary.zh: 电动工具的新加坡市场准入取决于该产品是否属于企业发展局管理的《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》下的受控产品。属于受控产品清单内的家用类工具须注册 SAFETY Mark，且注册须由作为责任经济经营者的新加坡本地注册供应商持有。工业工具一般不在受控产品清单内，无需 SAFETY Mark，但仍受一般消费者保护和产品安全义务约束。
summary.zht: 電動工具的新加坡市場准入取決於該產品是否屬於企業發展局管理的《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》下的受控產品。屬於受控產品清單內的家用類工具須註冊 SAFETY Mark，且註冊須由作為責任經濟經營者的新加坡本地註冊供應商持有。工業工具一般不在受控產品清單內，無需 SAFETY Mark，但仍受一般消費者保護和產品安全義務約束。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme administered by Enterprise Singapore
SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods, held by a Singapore-based Registered Supplier
SS/IEC 62841 series [commonly accepted safety standard route]

summary.en: China power-tool safety files commonly reference the GB/T 3883 series for hand-held motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery, with CCC certification where the product type is listed. GB/T 3883 evidence does not replace SAFETY Mark registration, the Registered Supplier obligation, or Singapore market-access documentation.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具安全文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，覆盖手持式电动工具、可移式工具及园林工具，产品类型在目录内时加 CCC 认证。GB/T 3883 证据不能替代 SAFETY Mark 注册、注册供应商义务或新加坡市场准入文件。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具安全文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，覆蓋手持式電動工具、可移式工具及園林工具，產品類型在目錄內時加 CCC 認證。GB/T 3883 證據不能替代 SAFETY Mark 註冊、註冊供應商義務或新加坡市場准入文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification where the product type is listed

gap.en: A China domestic safety report is not enough for Singapore placement of an in-scope household tool. The product needs controlled-goods classification screening, SAFETY Mark registration, a Singapore-based Registered Supplier as responsible operator, and supporting safety evidence aligned to SS/IEC 62841.
gap.zh: 对于范围内的家用工具，中国国内安全报告不足以支持投放新加坡市场。产品需进行受控产品分类筛查、SAFETY Mark 注册、由新加坡本地注册供应商作为责任经营者，并提供与 SS/IEC 62841 对齐的安全证据。
gap.zht: 對於範圍內的家用工具，中國國內安全報告不足以支援投放新加坡市場。產品需進行受控產品分類篩查、SAFETY Mark 註冊、由新加坡本地註冊供應商作為責任經營者，並提供與 SS/IEC 62841 對齊的安全證據。

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for a household tool within the controlled-goods list: SAFETY Mark registration under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme, held by a Singapore-based Registered Supplier. Industrial tools are generally not Controlled Goods and are not subject to the SAFETY Mark, though general product-safety duties still apply. SS/IEC 62841 is a commonly accepted standard route, not itself a marking.
target.zh: 对于受控产品清单内的家用工具为强制法律义务：须在《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》下完成 SAFETY Mark 注册，由新加坡本地注册供应商持有。工业工具一般不属于受控产品，不受 SAFETY Mark 约束，但一般产品安全义务仍然适用。SS/IEC 62841 是常用的标准路径，本身不是标识。
target.zht: 對於受控產品清單內的家用工具為強制法律義務：須在《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》下完成 SAFETY Mark 註冊，由新加坡本地註冊供應商持有。工業工具一般不屬於受控產品，不受 SAFETY Mark 約束，但一般產品安全義務仍然適用。SS/IEC 62841 是常用的標準路徑，本身不是標識。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series for in-scope power tools, with CCC where listed.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常对适用电动工具采用 GB/T 3883 系列，目录内时加 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常對適用電動工具採用 GB/T 3883 系列，目錄內時加 CCC。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Singapore-ready as-is for an in-scope household tool if the product file only contains GB/T 3883 evidence. Controlled-goods classification, SAFETY Mark registration, and a Singapore-based Registered Supplier are required; industrial tools are generally outside the controlled-goods list but still carry general product-safety duties.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于范围内的家用工具，若产品文件仅包含 GB/T 3883 证据，则现状不能视为新加坡就绪。必须完成受控产品分类、SAFETY Mark 注册并指定新加坡本地注册供应商；工业工具一般不在受控产品清单内，但仍有一般产品安全义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於範圍內的家用工具，若產品文件僅包含 GB/T 3883 證據，則現狀不能視為新加坡就緒。必須完成受控產品分類、SAFETY Mark 註冊並指定新加坡本地註冊供應商；工業工具一般不在受控產品清單內，但仍有一般產品安全義務。
